flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 25% at Northeastern Illinois University vs the 2018–2022 baseline (3.9k vs 5.1k).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Northeastern Illinois University fell 14% between 2021 and 2024 (60.8% → 52.3%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Northeastern Illinois University fell 12% between 2021 and 2024 (4.5k → 4.0k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Northeastern Illinois University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.4% → 0.0%).
